{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Inventory Control Officer",
  "description": "CareerHive Management -&nbsp;We pride ourselves in bringing the world of work together through technology by recruiting highly qualified technical &amp; non technical talents for your brand.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Inventory Control Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a detail-oriented and organized Inventory Control Officer to oversee and manage inventory levels, ensure accurate record-keeping, and optimize stock management processes.
	The successful candidate will play a vital role in maintaining inventory accuracy, minimizing discrepancies, and supporting overall operational efficiency.


Key Responsibilities


	Monitor and manage inventory levels to ensure adequate stock availability while minimizing excess.
	Conduct regular inventory counts and audits to verify stock accuracy.
	Maintain accurate inventory records using inventory management systems and Excel spreadsheets.
	Analyze inventory data to identify trends, discrepancies, and areas for improvement.
	Coordinate with procurement, warehousing, and sales teams to ensure seamless inventory flow.
	Generate reports on inventory status, stock movements, and discrepancies for management review.
	Implement and enforce inventory control policies and procedures.
	Investigate and resolve inventory discrepancies or issues promptly.
	Maintain organized and up-to-date inventory documentation.


Qualifications &amp; Skills


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree
	Proven experience in inventory control, stock management, or related roles.
	Strong proficiency in Microsoft Excel, including data analysis, pivot tables, VLOOKUP, and formulas.
	Excellent organizational and analytical skills.
	Attention to detail and accuracy.
	Effective communication and teamwork abilities.
	Ability to work independently and handle multiple tasks efficiently.
	Experience with inventory management software (e.g., Odoo, SAP, Oracle, QuickBooks).
	Knowledge of supply chain and logistics processes.
",
  "datePosted": "2026-03-19",
  "validThrough": "2026-04-01",

Inventory Control Officer Job at CareerHive Management




        
    

        
        CareerHive Management - We pride ourselves in bringing the world of work together through technology by recruiting highly qualified technical & non technical talents for your brand.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Inventory Control Officer

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a detail-oriented and organized Inventory Control Officer to oversee and manage inventory levels, ensure accurate record-keeping, and optimize stock management processes.
	The successful candidate will play a vital role in maintaining inventory accuracy, minimizing discrepancies, and supporting overall operational efficiency.


Key Responsibilities


	Monitor and manage inventory levels to ensure adequate stock availability while minimizing excess.
	Conduct regular inventory counts and audits to verify stock accuracy.
	Maintain accurate inventory records using inventory management systems and Excel spreadsheets.
	Analyze inventory data to identify trends, discrepancies, and areas for improvement.
	Coordinate with procurement, warehousing, and sales teams to ensure seamless inventory flow.
	Generate reports on inventory status, stock movements, and discrepancies for management review.
	Implement and enforce inventory control policies and procedures.
	Investigate and resolve inventory discrepancies or issues promptly.
	Maintain organized and up-to-date inventory documentation.


Qualifications & Skills


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor’s Degree
	Proven experience in inventory control, stock management, or related roles.
	Strong proficiency in Microsoft Excel, including data analysis, pivot tables, VLOOKUP, and formulas.
	Excellent organizational and analytical skills.
	Attention to detail and accuracy.
	Effective communication and teamwork abilities.
	Ability to work independently and handle multiple tasks efficiently.
	Experience with inventory management software (e.g., Odoo, SAP, Oracle, QuickBooks).
	Knowledge of supply chain and logistics processes.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "description": "CareerHive Management -&nbsp;We pride ourselves in bringing the world of work together through technology by recruiting highly qualified technical &amp; non technical talents for your business.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Junior Account Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Orile-Iganmu, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time (Fully Onsite)
Industry: Steel Trade

Job Summary


	We are seeking a detail-oriented Junior Account Officer to support daily financial operations within our steel trading business.
	The ideal candidate will assist in maintaining accurate financial records, processing transactions, and ensuring compliance with accounting standards.


Key Responsibilities


	Record and reconcile daily financial transactions
	Assist with accounts payable and receivable processes
	Maintain accurate financial records and documentation
	Prepare basic financial reports and support audits
	Monitor expenses and ensure proper cost tracking
	Support inventory and sales reconciliation.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Accounting or a related field
	1 - 2 years of relevant accounting experience
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel
	Familiarity with accounting software (e.g., QuickBooks, Sage, or similar)
	Strong attention to detail and organizational skills
	Good analytical and communication skills.


Salary
N100,000 monthly.",

Junior Account Officer Job at CareerHive Management




        
    

        
        CareerHive Management - We pride ourselves in bringing the world of work together through technology by recruiting highly qualified technical & non technical talents for your business.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Junior Account Officer

Job Location: Orile-Iganmu, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time (Fully Onsite)
Industry: Steel Trade

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a detail-oriented Junior Account Officer to support daily financial operations within our steel trading business.
	The ideal candidate will assist in maintaining accurate financial records, processing transactions, and ensuring compliance with accounting standards.


Key Responsibilities


	Record and reconcile daily financial transactions
	Assist with accounts payable and receivable processes
	Maintain accurate financial records and documentation
	Prepare basic financial reports and support audits
	Monitor expenses and ensure proper cost tracking
	Support inventory and sales reconciliation.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Accounting or a related field
	1 - 2 years of relevant accounting experience
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel
	Familiarity with accounting software (e.g., QuickBooks, Sage, or similar)
	Strong attention to detail and organizational skills
	Good analytical and communication skills.


Salary
N100,000 monthly.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Graphics Designer",
  "description": "Jeroid Limited is a leading Nigerian fintech company offering innovative solutions in cryptocurrency trading, gift card redemption, and digital payments. With a user base of over 200,000, we are committed to delivering secure, fast, and reliable services. At Jeroid, we value exceptional customer experiences and are seeking a dedicated Customer Service Representative to join our growing team.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Graphics Designer

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Job type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are seeking a creative and detail-oriented Graphics Designer to develop visually engaging designs that support our marketing, branding, and communication initiatives.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for producing high-quality visual content across digital platforms, including both static and motion graphics.


Key Responsibilities


	Design visually appealing graphics, illustrations, and layouts for various platforms
	Collaborate with the PR/Marketing team to develop creative concepts aligned with campaign goals
	Ensure brand consistency across all design outputs
	Edit and retouch images to enhance quality and visual appeal
	Select and apply appropriate typography to improve readability and design impact
	Utilize design tools such as Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, After Effects, etc.)
	Incorporate feedback from stakeholders and make necessary revisions
	Maintain an organized repository of design files on the company drive
	Respond to urgent or ad-hoc design requests when required
	Support content coordination and ensure timely delivery of design assets


Requirements


	Proven experience as a Graphics Designer or in a similar role
	Strong portfolio showcasing both static and motion design work
	Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite and other relevant design tools
	Good understanding of branding, layout, color theory, and typography
	Ability to work in a fast-paced environment and meet deadlines
	Strong attention to detail and creativity
	Good communication and teamwork skills


What We&rsquo;re Looking For


	A proactive and creative thinker
	Someone who can take initiative and work with minimal supervision
	Strong ability to interpret briefs and deliver high-quality visuals
	Flexibility to handle multiple tasks and urgent requests


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to:&nbsp;Vacancy@jeroid.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Graphics Designer Job at Jeroid Limited




        
    

        
        Jeroid Limited is a leading Nigerian fintech company offering innovative solutions in cryptocurrency trading, gift card redemption, and digital payments. With a user base of over 200,000, we are committed to delivering secure, fast, and reliable services. At Jeroid, we value exceptional customer experiences and are seeking a dedicated Customer Service Representative to join our growing team.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Graphics Designer

Job Location: Lagos
Job type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a creative and detail-oriented Graphics Designer to develop visually engaging designs that support our marketing, branding, and communication initiatives.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for producing high-quality visual content across digital platforms, including both static and motion graphics.


Key Responsibilities


	Design visually appealing graphics, illustrations, and layouts for various platforms
	Collaborate with the PR/Marketing team to develop creative concepts aligned with campaign goals
	Ensure brand consistency across all design outputs
	Edit and retouch images to enhance quality and visual appeal
	Select and apply appropriate typography to improve readability and design impact
	Utilize design tools such as Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, After Effects, etc.)
	Incorporate feedback from stakeholders and make necessary revisions
	Maintain an organized repository of design files on the company drive
	Respond to urgent or ad-hoc design requests when required
	Support content coordination and ensure timely delivery of design assets


Requirements


	Proven experience as a Graphics Designer or in a similar role
	Strong portfolio showcasing both static and motion design work
	Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite and other relevant design tools
	Good understanding of branding, layout, color theory, and typography
	Ability to work in a fast-paced environment and meet deadlines
	Strong attention to detail and creativity
	Good communication and teamwork skills


What We’re Looking For


	A proactive and creative thinker
	Someone who can take initiative and work with minimal supervision
	Strong ability to interpret briefs and deliver high-quality visuals
	Flexibility to handle multiple tasks and urgent requests


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Business Manager",
  "description": "Jeroid Limited is a leading Nigerian fintech company offering innovative solutions in cryptocurrency trading, gift card redemption, and digital payments. With a user base of over 200,000, we are committed to delivering secure, fast, and reliable services. At Jeroid, we value exceptional customer experiences and are seeking a dedicated Customer Service Representative to join our growing team.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Job type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a highly organized and strategic Business Manager to oversee and coordinate the daily operations of the organization.
	The ideal candidate will play a key role in driving operational efficiency, supporting strategic growth, and ensuring that business activities align with the company&rsquo;s overall objectives.
	This position requires strong leadership, business acumen, and the ability to manage multiple operational functions effectively.


Key Responsibilities


	Collaborate with the CEO and management team to develop and implement operational goals aligned with the company&rsquo;s strategy.
	Evaluate current operational performance and develop strategic plans to improve efficiency and productivity.
	Identify and implement process improvements across departments to enhance operational effectiveness.
	Oversee the allocation and utilization of organizational resources.
	Work closely with the finance department to develop budgets, monitor expenses, and ensure cost-effective operations.
	Review operational reports and provide recommendations for improvement.
	Ensure business operations comply with company policies, quality standards, and regulatory requirements.
	Collaborate with internal teams including sales, marketing, and product to ensure operational alignment with business objectives.
	Represent the company in engagements with external stakeholders when required.
	Identify potential operational risks and implement mitigation strategies.
	Ensure the organization remains compliant with relevant industry regulations and standards.
	Work with the IT team to ensure operational systems and technology platforms support business needs.
	Stay updated on operational best practices, trends, and innovations to improve business performance.


Required Qualifications


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Business Administration, Management, Finance, Economics, or a related field.
	4&ndash;7+ years of relevant experience in business operations, business management, or a similar leadership role.
	Strong understanding of business operations, strategic planning, and organizational management.
	Experience managing cross-functional teams and coordinating multiple departments.
	Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
	Excellent communication and stakeholder management abilities.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office and business management tools.


Key Skills:


	Strategic thinking and operational planning
	Leadership and team management
	Financial and budget management
	Process improvement and efficiency optimization
	Risk management and compliance awareness
	Strong organizational and decision-making skills
	Excellent communication and reporting skills


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to:&nbsp;Vacancy@jeroid.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Business Manager Job at Jeroid Limited




        
    

        
        Jeroid Limited is a leading Nigerian fintech company offering innovative solutions in cryptocurrency trading, gift card redemption, and digital payments. With a user base of over 200,000, we are committed to delivering secure, fast, and reliable services. At Jeroid, we value exceptional customer experiences and are seeking a dedicated Customer Service Representative to join our growing team.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Manager

Job Location: Lagos
Job type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a highly organized and strategic Business Manager to oversee and coordinate the daily operations of the organization.
	The ideal candidate will play a key role in driving operational efficiency, supporting strategic growth, and ensuring that business activities align with the company’s overall objectives.
	This position requires strong leadership, business acumen, and the ability to manage multiple operational functions effectively.


Key Responsibilities


	Collaborate with the CEO and management team to develop and implement operational goals aligned with the company’s strategy.
	Evaluate current operational performance and develop strategic plans to improve efficiency and productivity.
	Identify and implement process improvements across departments to enhance operational effectiveness.
	Oversee the allocation and utilization of organizational resources.
	Work closely with the finance department to develop budgets, monitor expenses, and ensure cost-effective operations.
	Review operational reports and provide recommendations for improvement.
	Ensure business operations comply with company policies, quality standards, and regulatory requirements.
	Collaborate with internal teams including sales, marketing, and product to ensure operational alignment with business objectives.
	Represent the company in engagements with external stakeholders when required.
	Identify potential operational risks and implement mitigation strategies.
	Ensure the organization remains compliant with relevant industry regulations and standards.
	Work with the IT team to ensure operational systems and technology platforms support business needs.
	Stay updated on operational best practices, trends, and innovations to improve business performance.


Required Qualifications


	Bachelor’s Degree in Business Administration, Management, Finance, Economics, or a related field.
	4–7+ years of relevant experience in business operations, business management, or a similar leadership role.
	Strong understanding of business operations, strategic planning, and organizational management.
	Experience managing cross-functional teams and coordinating multiple departments.
	Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
	Excellent communication and stakeholder management abilities.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office and business management tools.


Key Skills:


	Strategic thinking and operational planning
	Leadership and team management
	Financial and budget management
	Process improvement and efficiency optimization
	Risk management and compliance awareness
	Strong organizational and decision-making skills
	Excellent communication and reporting skills


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Support Staff Job at Soteria Eye Clinic




        
    

        
        Soteria Eye Clinic is a private enterprise registered in Nigeria as a limited liability company to offer high quality, affordable and accessible comprehensive world class eye care services to our immediate community and environs. Our purpose is to create and deliver first class comprehensive eye care services to ALL in order to “Improve Lives through Affordable Quality Eye Care.”

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Support Staff
Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Provide general admintrative suspport to the department
	Assist in maintianing calls, emials, and inquiries professionally
